steps.title: Identify the problem-solution structure
steps.content: The “but” signals a constraint: practical effects are superior but too expensive. This problem must lead to the filmmakers' response in the next sentence.

steps.title: Match the causal link
steps.content:
“For this reason,” expresses that the blended approach is a consequence of the cost constraint — it's the solution to the problem just stated.

The other three don't establish this cause-and-effect logic: they suggest comparison, additional information, or restatement instead.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
